notes: prediction_records are event/artifact references, so repeat post attempts for the same Metaculus post are counted separately.
unique_metaculus_posts_with_verified_or_current_user_forecast deduplicates posted records by Metaculus post id.
Metaculus score_data is account/question-level data exposed by the API; it may summarize forecast history, not necessarily only the single event_prediction.
Brier values are computed locally from the event prediction when available and from the current account latest forecast when available.
Multiple-choice brier_sum is sum_i (p_i - outcome_i)^2; brier_normalized_by_2 is also included for comparison.
